originalTitle: Starship Test Delayed Again. SpaceX Stock Is Down.
summary: SpaceX stock rose in regular trading on Thursday as investors waited for an all-important Starship test flight. Shares of Elon Musk’s rocket and AI company were down 1.7% at $116.28 in late trading. Earlier, SpaceX stock gained 2.6%, closing at $118.24, while the and lost 1.2% and 1%, respectively.
content: SpaceX stock rose in regular trading on Thursday as investors waited for an all-important Starship test flight. Shares of Elon Musk’s rocket and AI company were down 1.7% at $116.28 in late trading. Earlier, SpaceX stock gained 2.6%, closing at $118.24, while the and lost 1.2% and 1%, respectively.
chineseTitle: 星舰测试再次推迟。 SpaceX 股价下跌。
chineseSummary: 由于投资者等待至关重要的星舰试飞，SpaceX 股价周四在常规交易中上涨。埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的火箭和人工智能公司股价尾盘下跌 1.7%，至 116.28 美元。早些时候，SpaceX 股价上涨 2.6%，收于 118.24 美元，而 SpaceX 和 SpaceX 分别下跌 1.2% 和 1%。
chineseContent: 由于投资者等待至关重要的星舰试飞，SpaceX 股价周四在常规交易中上涨。埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的火箭和人工智能公司股价尾盘下跌 1.7%，至 116.28 美元。早些时候，SpaceX 股价上涨 2.6%，收于 118.24 美元，而 SpaceX 和 SpaceX 分别下跌 1.2% 和 1%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
